title: Adhyatma Niketan
tagline: Adhyatma Niketan — heritage city of Madhya Pradesh

overview.short: Adhyatma Niketan is an ashram in Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India.
overview.description: Adhyatma Niketan is an ashram in Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India. It is situated on Koteshwar Road, Near Vinay Nagar sector-1, is around 7 km from the Gwalior Railway station. The land was purchased by Huzur Malik Saheb Sant Yogi ManSingh ji in 1961 to establish an ashram. When Swami Vishnu Tirth Ji Maharaj visited Gwalior on 11 April 1960, the place was inaugurated and named 'Adhyatma Niketan'.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Maharaj Bada, Gwalior
topPlaces.description: Maharaj Bada or Maharaja Square is one of the most significant and lively places of Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India. It is known as the most beautiful square in Asia consisting of six different architectural halls namely: the Victoria Hall, the Town Hall, the Gwalior State Minting Hall, the American Hall, the Saudi Hall and the Opera Hall.

topPlaces.name: Rail Spring Karkhana
topPlaces.description: The Rail Spring Karkhana (Rail Spring Factory) (Hindi: रेल स्प्रिंग कारखाना), located near Sithouli Railway Station around 12.8 km way from Gwalior Railway Station Gwalior in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. It is a major railway workshop for Indian Railways which manufacture Hot Coil Springs of different types for diverse Rolling Stocks.

topPlaces.name: Diocese of Gwalior
topPlaces.description: The Roman Catholic Diocese of Gwalior (Latin: Gwalioren(sis)) is a diocese located in the city of Gwalior in the ecclesiastical province of Bhopal in India.

topPlaces.name: Usha Kiran Palace
topPlaces.description: Usha Kiran Palace is a heritage hotel, adjacent to Jai Vilas Mahal on a 9-acre land in Gwalior built by the royal Scindia dynasty of the Marathas. The management of the five-star hotel is done by Taj Hotels Resorts and Palaces.

topPlaces.name: Jai Vilas Mahal
topPlaces.description: The Jai Vilas Palace is a nineteenth-century palace in Gwalior, India. It was built in 1874 by Jayajirao Scindia, the Maharaja of Gwalior in the British Raj.

items.note: Maharaj Bada or Maharaja Square is one of the most significant and lively places of Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India. It is known as the most beautiful square in Asia consisting of six different architectural halls namely: the Victoria Hall, the Town Hall, the Gwalior State Minting Hall, the American Hall, the Saudi Hall and the Opera Hall.

The Rail Spring Karkhana (Rail Spring Factory) (Hindi: रेल स्प्रिंग कारखाना), located near Sithouli Railway Station around 12.8 km way from Gwalior Railway Station Gwalior in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. It is a major railway workshop for Indian Railways which manufacture Hot Coil Springs of different types for diverse Rolling Stocks.
The Roman Catholic Diocese of Gwalior (Latin: Gwalioren(sis)) is a diocese located in the city of Gwalior in the ecclesiastical province of Bhopal in India.

Usha Kiran Palace is a heritage hotel, adjacent to Jai Vilas Mahal on a 9-acre land in Gwalior built by the royal Scindia dynasty of the Marathas. The management of the five-star hotel is done by Taj Hotels Resorts and Palaces.
The Jai Vilas Palace is a nineteenth-century palace in Gwalior, India. It was built in 1874 by Jayajirao Scindia, the Maharaja of Gwalior in the British Raj.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Adhyatma Niketan?
faq.a: The best time to visit Adhyatma Niketan is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Adhyatma Niketan?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Gwalior Airport (21 km) and the nearest railway station is Gwalior Junction (12 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Adhyatma Niketan?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Adhyatma Niketan at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Adhyatma Niketan?
faq.a: Stays in Adhyatma Niketan start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Adhyatma Niketan?
faq.a: The top attractions are Maharaj Bada, Gwalior, Rail Spring Karkhana, Diocese of Gwalior, Usha Kiran Palace, Jai Vilas Mahal.
